data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'real-time itinerary updates', but the evidence does not confirm that real-time updates are implemented or functioning as required. While the itinerary mentions that the Bistro was running late and adjustments were made, there is no concrete evidence of a system mechanism that provides real-time updates to users. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of a system mechanism for real-time updates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
